daily_brief.headline: Risk-off: 49% breadth, tighten stops; macro mildly negative

highlights.title: Iran war, U.S. court’s tariff ruling delays India trade deal — but a bigger risk lies ahead
Rupee's valuation sinks to over-a-decade low, bruised by Iran war, portfolio outflows
Shriram Finance Q4 Results: Standalone profit jumps 41% YoY to Rs 3,014 crore, NII rises 16%
Adani Green Energy Q4 Results: Profit soars 34% YoY to ₹514 crore; income up 14%
The simple yet powerful plan India could follow to ward off impacts of Iran-like disasters
India’s private sector gains momentum in April on manufacturing strength

daily_brief.key_insight: Risk-off regime with 49% breadth and median momentum -0.9%. Raise cash, honour stops, resist bottom-fishing until breadth recovers above 55%. Macro flow is mildly negative with 155 policy/global items in focus — factor this into position sizing. Sector dispersion is wide: Mining leads at 62 while Paints lags at 1 — a stock-picker's tape.

conviction_board.name: Nestle India
conviction_board.narrative: NESTLEIND's momentum is running hot with RSI at 89. The question is whether this leg has more room or needs a breather. There's no discernible trend. The stock is range-bound and waiting for direction. Market headwinds are real — 49% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. FMCG is lagging the broader tape (score 19) — an extra headwind. Watch ₹1,379 — a break below opens further downside. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish.

conviction_board.name: ONGC
conviction_board.narrative: One thing to watch: momentum is diverging from the trend. The structure is fine but the engine is losing steam. The trend is solidly positive — price sits above all key averages, though alignment isn't perfect. RSI 46. Neutral. Nothing to act on from momentum alone. Volume is thin (0.5x) — take any move with a pinch of salt. Market headwinds are real — 49% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. ₹276 is the line in the sand. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish → Mildly Bearish.
